title: eBike Connect – connected eBiking - Bosch eBike Connect

headers.text: News about Nyon, Kiox, the portal and app

paragraphs: Whether bicycle navigation, flexible route planning or effective fitness training. We connect you to your digital environment and open up completely new dimensions in eBiking - for even more fun while riding!
Take the shortest route from A to B or discover new things spontaneously. With GPS and smart route planning, your computer guides you with ease through the city street or unknown terrain in nature.

Transform your eBike into a smart personal trainer: the computer records your every journey. So you always have an eye on your activities and can integrate your personal training into your daily routine and evaluate it after the ride. You can also synchronize your ride data from the eBike Connect app with Strava, Apple Health or Google Fit.
Your connected training partner. Kiox offers all the functions that a sporty rider needs – including navigation that you can use with the smartphone app.
Unparalleled versatility. The new Nyon on-board computer is the connected all-rounder for your eBike. The touch function makes the color display easy to use.

High-performance riding on the eMTB: Among other things, we present a new eBike ABS for professionals on the trail, two powerful batteries, a new display and give you a promise – with the latest Performance Line CX.

2025 is all about Connected Biking and the topics of theft protection, navigation, personalisation, update and service. With new digital functions for more efficient route planning. Plus: a new riding mode and new eShift solutions.
The perfect match: We are increasing the number of products and features in the smart system – for even more choice and more individual riding fun.
Our website is available for different regions and in different languages.Please make your selection from the options below.
